prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PGM-BLE-KITCHENUTENSILSET-BLK-7PC Product Type: KNIFE_BLOCK_SET Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Black Stainless Steel Cooking Baking Culinary Tools Kitchen Utensils Set with Cutting Board Chefs Knife, 7pc Description: A fantastic option for anyone who needs a starter set of kitchen and cooking utensils with a modern design. Whether for college students, wedding gift or housewarming gift, this 7pc knife set from Beille has all your cooking and kitchen essentials covered, featuring a sleek, matte black finish.

- Chef's knife
- Cleaver knife
- 4-in-1 kitchen utility knife
- Cutting board
- Vegetable peeler
- All purpose kitchen scissors/shears
- Bottle opener
- Can opener
- Plastic storage stand

The three knives included with this set, a chef's knife, a cleaver knife and a 4-in-1 utility kitchen knife, all of which feature non-corroding, stainless steel blades with ergonomic plastic handles (hand washing always recommended here). As mentioned, the 4-in-1 kitchen utility knife includes a top serrated edge, a can opener and a bottle opener, making it a great kitchen and cooking multitool. The knife variety included in this set will have all your cutting requirements covered, whether it's meat, vegetables, fruits, herbs and more.

In addition to the knives, the cooking utensils set includes a matching black cutting board for food prep. The cutting board includes a built in handle for easy maneuvering and hanging storage; and, measuring 8 x 13 inches, it's the perfect size for dicing, chopping and more (dishwasher safe).

Lastly, the kitchen and cooking utensils set comes with handy black plastic countertop stand, which neatly stores and keeps all the pieces organized and together, so you can quickly reach for whichever tool you need and take a pass on the drawer digging.

Get prepping, cooking, baking and creating in the kitchen with the Beille Black Stainless Steel Kitchen Cooking Utensils 7pc Set. Search Terms: cooking utensils set college student housewarming gift wedding gifts multitools culinary tools kitchen food prep stainless steel knife set black cookware cutting mats scissors shears bottle opener vegetable peeler can opener utility knife knives Features: - COMPLETE BLACK COOKING UTENSILS SET: Great for anyone who needs a starter set of cooking utensils, this 7pc kitchen set from Beille has all your kitchen essentials covered including a chefs knife, cutting board, vegetable peeler, all purpose shears and more, all in a sleek black matte finish - STAINLESS STEEL KNIVES: The three knives included with this set, a chefs knife, a cleaver knife and a 4 in 1 utility kitchen knife with bottle opener and serrated top edge, all feature non-corroding, stainless steel blades with ergonomic plastic handles; hand washing recommended - FOOD PREP CUTTING BOARD: The set includes a matching plastic black cutting board with handle that's ideal for all kinds of ingredient and food prep; measuring 8 x 13 inches, this cutting board is a great size for dicing, chopping, prepping and more; dishwasher safe - COOKING SET INCLUDES: The kitchen accessories set includes a 1 x 7 inch cleaver knife (2.5 inch width), 1 x 8 inch chefs knife, 1 x 5 inch 4-in-1 utility knife, 1 x all purpose shears with bottle opener, 1 x peeler, 1 x cutting board, 1 x plastic stand - SPECIFICATIONS: Box Dimensions: 13 x 8 x 2; Blade Material: Stainless Steel; Color: Black; Weight: 1.55lbs; Handy black plastic countertop stand included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 7pc Black Stainless Steel Kitchen Utensils Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Chef's Knife, Cleaver, Utility Knife, Cutting Board, Scissors, Peeler, Storage Stand, Dishwasher Safe

openai.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel Blades, Cutting Board, Shears, Peeler, 4-In-1 Utility Knife, Countertop Stand
